title: Tanaka-kun is Always Listless
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode TV season (2016) adapting the manga by Nozomi Uda. Manga complete at 140 chapters (13 volumes plus a 13.5 supplement), serialized 2013-2019 on Gangan Online. This is a plotless, episodic slice-of-life comedy with NO named story arcs; the anime cherry-picks and partially adapts chapters, jumping around and skipping heavily, but overall draws from roughly chapters 1-40. Chapter ranges below are approximate, using the official episode titles as segment labels and dividing the adapted material proportionally (~3 chapters/episode) rather than as exact boundaries. The final entry is a chapters-only tail covering the large unadapted remainder of the manga.
